rows.label: tlk70000055_05_msg0001
rows.name:
I was so worried about how down
Noel was that I tried talking
to him about it in the end.

rows.label: tlk70000055_05_msg0002
rows.name:
Seems like he realized how dispirited
he'd been in the attack, and that made
him feel even more down on himself.

rows.label: tlk70000055_05_msg0003
rows.name:
So I took the plunge and said it:
You were gloomy from the start,
and I still became your friend.

rows.label: tlk70000055_05_msg0004
rows.name:
As expected, he cried and
grabbed at me. I thought
I'd said it wrong again...

rows.label: tlk70000055_05_msg0005
rows.name:
But actually, he thanked me
for being honest with him!
He did cry, though. A lot.

rows.label: tlk70000055_05_msg0006
rows.name:
Then I started crying, too, and the
waterworks just wouldn't stop. Makes
you laugh now, doesn't it?

rows.label: tlk70000055_05_msg0007
rows.name:
I'm really glad I was able to talk to
him. It made me realize that nothing
happens if you don't make the effort.
